name: Fish in Sweet and Sour Sauce Wih Coconut-Rice
recipeIngredient: 200 grams savoy cabbage, cut into thin strips
227 grams crushed pineapple in light syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw fish and shrimp if necessary.
2. Cut the fish into cubes and dip in lemon juice.
3. Heat oil in a pan, lightly brown vegetables (onion, carrot, zucchini, cabbage) until tender.
4. Add fish stock, crushed pineapple, pineapple juice, vinegar, sugar, ginger, garlic, soy sauce, cayenne pepper, and salt to the pan. Stir gently for 3-4 minutes.
5. Add the fish cubes and stir another 4-5 minutes.
6. Add the shrimp and cook until heated through, about 2-3 minutes.
7. Mix cornstarch with water and add it to the saucepan. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until the mixture thickens.
8. Garnish with fresh coriander leaves or parsley sprigs if desired.
Coconut-Rice Instructions:
1. Boil water, coconut flakes, and salt for 2-3 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
2. Strain the mixture to separate any solids, reserving approximately 4.5 deciliters of liquid.
3. If needed, add extra water to reach the desired consistency.
4. Add salt according to taste.
5. Bring the coconut-infused liquid to a boil again.
6. Cook the jasmine rice in the boiling coconut liquid following the package instructions.
